headline: McCormick Merger With Unilever Foods Reshapes Growth And Valuation Story
summary: McCormick (NYSE:MKC) has agreed to merge with Unilever’s Foods business in a transaction that would combine two major packaged foods portfolios. The company has created a new Chief Integration Officer role to oversee the merger process and appointed interim executive leadership to guide the transition. The deal remains subject to regulatory and other approvals before closing. For you as an investor, this move places McCormick at the center of a larger packaged foods platform, spanning...
